archive_data.question_text: Which of the following rivers has Musi river as one of its tributaries?

explanation.english: Musi River is a tributary of the Krishna River. It originates in the Ananthagiri Hills and flows through Hyderabad before joining the Krishna River.
explanation.tanglish: Musi aaru Krishna aarudan ulla oru kila aaru. Ithu Ananthagiri malaiyil undaki Hyderabad vazhaga oadi Krishna aaril saerum.

archive_data.question_text: Antibiotics are NOT effective on a virus as it lacks ______.

explanation.english: Antibiotics are effective against bacteria because they target bacterial cell walls or protein synthesis. Viruses lack cell walls and are acellular, so antibiotics are ineffective against them.
explanation.tanglish: Antibiotics bacteria mel prabavamaaga ullathu seythiyaal virusku cell wall illai. Virus cell wall illamal iruppathaal antibiotics virus saethai theerkkaadhu.

archive_data.question_text: When a body rolls over the surface of another body, the resistance to its motion is called ______.

explanation.english: Rolling friction is the resistive force that opposes the rolling motion of an object over a surface. It is different from sliding friction which occurs when surfaces slide against each other.
explanation.tanglish: Oru padartham maru oru padarthathin mela urundaiyaaga sendraal atharku rolling friction endra peyar. Ithu sliding friction oda vithyasaanaathu.

archive_data.question_text: India secured ______ place in the World Competitiveness Index released in June 2020.

explanation.english: According to the IMD World Competitiveness Index released in June 2020, India secured the 43rd position among 63 countries.
explanation.tanglish: June 2020 vil vantha IMD World Competitiveness Indexil India 63 nattugalil 43 am idathai adaindhu irukkirathu.

archive_data.question_text: In which of the following years did Razia become the Sultan of Delhi?

explanation.english: Razia Sultan, the daughter of Iltutmish, became the Sultan of Delhi in 1236. She was the first and only woman ruler of the Delhi Sultanate.
explanation.tanglish: Iltutmishin magal Razia Sultan 1236 am aandil Delhi Sultan aanaar. Aval Delhi Sultaanathin mudhal peN aalunar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements is NOT true about Ashokan pillars?

options.text: These are said to be monolithic pillars.
Ashoka got the inspiration for such pillars from his father Bindusar.
These were usually made of sandstone.

explanation.english: Ashokan pillars were inspired by the Achaemenid Persian pillars, not by his father Bindusara. They are monolithic, mostly made of sandstone, and highly polished.
explanation.tanglish: Ashoka sthambangal Persiya sthambangalin paadathil undakkappattana, avan than endhran Bindusarin paadathil alla. Ithu monolithic, sand stoneil undakappattathu, polish seyyaappattana.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following sultans of Delhi was the first one to start military campaigns in southern India?

explanation.english: Alauddin Khalji was the first Delhi Sultan to start military campaigns in southern India. He sent his general Malik Kafur to conquer the Deccan and South Indian kingdoms.
explanation.tanglish: Alauddin Khalji thanithu Delhi Sultaanatharku therku Indiaavil padai poka aarambithavar. Avan than thalapathi Malik Kafurai Deccan matrum therku India raajyangalai vettai aaga arulinaan.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following Articles was deleted by the Constitution (Forty-Fourth Amendment) Act, 1978?

explanation.english: The Constitution (Forty-Fourth Amendment) Act, 1978 deleted Article 31 which provided the Right to Property as a Fundamental Right. It was replaced by Article 300A making it a legal right.
explanation.tanglish: 44th Constitution Amendment 1978 il Article 31 ai neekkiyathu. Ithu Fundamental Right aana sampaththai urimaiyai neekki, ithai Article 300A vaippu kanoon urimaiyaakka maatrkiyathu.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following subjects is NOT listed in the Union List in the Seventh Schedule of the Constitution of India?

explanation.english: Public health and sanitation is listed in the State List (Entry 6) of the Seventh Schedule, while Insurance, Railways, and Corporation tax are in the Union List.
explanation.tanglish: Public health and sanitation State Listil (Entry 6) ullathu. Insurance, Railways, Corporation tax yavaiyum Union Listil ullana.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following statements about the 'pro tem' Speaker of the House of Representatives in India is correct?

options.text: The name for the post is recommended by the outgoing Speaker of the House of Representatives.
He is appointed by the President of India.
The name for the post is recommended by the Union Cabinet.
The name for the post is recommended by the Leader of Opposition in the House of Representatives.

explanation.english: The pro tem Speaker of the Lok Sabha is appointed by the President of India from among the senior-most members of the House. He presides over the first sitting of the new Lok Sabha until the election of the Speaker.
explanation.tanglish: Lok Sabhayin pro tem Speaker India President al niyamikkappadugiraar. Avar new Lok Sabhayin mudhal aasanai nadathi vaithu, Speaker theraippadum varai kadamai seigiraar.

archive_data.question_text: Which of the following states is a leading producer of natural rubber?

explanation.english: Kerala is the leading producer of natural rubber in India, accounting for about 90% of the country's total production. It is followed by Tamil Nadu and Karnataka.
explanation.tanglish: Indiaavil prakriti rubber utpattil Kerala mudhal idathil ullathu. Indiaavin 90% rubber utpattu Kerala vil nadakkirathu.
